title: RISC-V Studio
description: A complete RV32IMAFC + Zicsr assembler, cycle-stepping emulator, and time-travel debugger in the browser — now with the compressed (C) extension (hand-written c.* or one-click auto-compression) and a machine-mode trap & interrupt architecture (mtvec/mepc/mcause, mret, and a CLINT timer). Plus a from-scratch C compiler that lowers a real subset of C to RISC-V, IEEE-754 float, atomics, CSR counters, a memory-mapped framebuffer, syscall console, disassembler, shareable links, and an in-app verification suite.
